headline: GE Vernova (GEV) Is Realistic When It Comes To Nuclear, Says Jim Cramer
summary: GE Vernova Inc. (NYSE:GEV) is one of the 9 Stocks Jim Cramer Talked About & Commented On SpaceX’s IPO. Industrial power generation equipment manufacturer GE Vernova Inc. (NYSE:GEV) is one of Jim Cramer’s favorite stocks in the space. Throughout 2025, the CNBC TV asserted that the firm was the only worthwhile investment in the space […]
